settings.heading: Discover Yemen in Every Sip
settings.text: Premium Yemeni coffee, roasted for a rich and unforgettable cup. A heritage-led roast made for today's home coffee ritual.

settings.heading: Yemeni Corner Signature Roast
settings.text: One signature roast. One rich cup. A true taste of Yemeni coffee, launching as a 340 g whole bean bag.

settings.heading: A heritage roast, crafted for today
settings.text: Coffee has roots in Yemen. Yemeni Corner brings that story home through a clean, premium coffee experience made for everyday brewing.

settings.title: Grind fresh
settings.text: Start with whole beans and grind for your chosen brew method.

settings.title: Use clean water
settings.text: Good water helps the warm spice, cocoa, and dried fruit notes come forward.

settings.title: Brew with care
settings.text: Use drip, French press, pour-over, or espresso for a rich everyday cup.

settings.title: Enjoy warmly
settings.text: Serve it slowly, share it generously, and make the ritual your own.
